erreurs.lieu: Choose your venue from the list.
erreurs.email_domaine: This email address looks invalid (domain doesn't exist). Check the spelling.
erreurs.majeur: You must be an adult and accept the rules.

jeu.epuise_titre: Oops, a victim of its own success!
jeu.epuise_texte: The game isn't available right now at this venue: all prizes have been won!
jeu.epuise_texte2: Check back soon, stock will be restocked.

erreurs.reseau: The game didn't respond. Check your connection and try again.
erreurs.deja_joue: You've already played today! Come back and try your luck tomorrow.
erreurs.trop_de_tentatives: Limit reached for today! Reminder of the rule: 1 email address per day and 3 attempts maximum per player. Come back tomorrow at your venue to play again!
erreurs.etablissement_inconnu: This venue no longer takes part in the game.
erreurs.generique: The form seems incomplete. Go back and check your details.

resultat.piece_identite: You may be asked for an ID.
resultat.piece_identite_visite: You'll receive a confirmation email. You may be asked for an ID.
resultat.perdu_texte: The coin didn't land on the right side this time. Come back and try your luck tomorrow!
resultat.lot_remis_texte: This prize has already been collected.
resultat.lot_remis_texte2: This screen can no longer be used to collect a prize.
resultat.message_defaut: Show this screen at the bar **today, before closing** to claim your prize
